critical_issues.issue_text: Section 4.5.9 claims d_geo is undefined in dome's V13 coordinate system. This is factually WRONG. The dome's V13 page explicitly defines: d_geo = √(NS² + EW_arc²), where EW_arc = 4×a×E(e²)×(Δlon/360)×(r_avg/a), NS = |r₁−r₂|, with a=20,015 km, e=0.66, E(0.4356)≈1.211. A dome defender can immediately cite this, destroying the credibility of our lead argument in the section.
critical_issues.required_fix: Reframe: d_geo IS defined, but parameters are fitted post-hoc to WGS84 data, inputs are WGS84-derived, and n(r) remains undefined.

WIN-012.description: Dome site now has section 'The Law of Aether Pressure' (possibly new). May introduce independent coupling derivation. Current WIN-012 does not address this.

tasks: Replace hardcoded count 11 with dynamic computation
Archive Python source files (inject_ai_layer.py, update_optical_caveats.py, monitor.py)
Verify eclipse numbers against dome homepage

decision_note: 19 of 20 critical/major issues are prose/section issues, not wins.json patchable. Focus must shift to document-level prose and structural fixes. Only ISS-421 (WIN-012) is data-specific and requires monitoring.
